name: Anzac Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
"Don't let the name 'Biscuits' fool you. These rich and crunchy cookies are presumably of Australian origin, which may explain the name."
Combine dry ingredients in a bowl and make a well in the center. Melt butter and mix with corn syrup. Add soda mixed with boiling water, then pour this mixture into dry ingredients.
Mix to a moist but firm consistency. Drop by tablespoonfuls onto a cold greased cookie sheet. Bake at 250 degrees F. for about 20 minutes.
